_meta.purpose: Thresholds for the Decomposer pipeline stage. A planned task that exceeds any of these is split into N child tasks (one per target file by default) plus 1 integration task before routing.
_meta.principle: Micro-tasks have higher single-session success probability than oversized tasks. See feedback_micro_tasks_high_probability.md.
_meta.tuning_notes: Lower thresholds = more decomposition = safer but more board entries. Higher thresholds = less decomposition = riskier but tighter board. FN-009 (3490 lines, 9 files, 9 distinct outputs) failed; FN-002 (~80 lines, 1 file, 4 outputs) succeeded. Defaults split tasks like FN-009 and leave tasks like FN-002 alone.
